message:
fix(watch): prune stale waiters on re-registration to prevent unbounded growth

Previously, stale WatchWaiter entries (from cancelled/dropped futures)
accumulated in the waiters vec until the next wake_all call. Under
rapid cancel-recreate patterns this caused unbounded memory growth.

Now prune entries with strong_count == 1 (no owning Receiver) during
register_waker(), keeping the vec bounded to active receivers only.

- Add retain-based pruning in register_waker()
- Update cancel_and_recreate test to expect 1 waiter (was 50)
- Add dropped_receiver_waiter_is_pruned_on_next_registration test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
